Other retailer links on this page (B&H Photo, Bigscreen, direct manufacturer links) are provided as a convenience and do not currently earn us a commission. Our recommendations are editorially independent.

sections.title: VR Headsets
sections.description: Our picks for the best VR headsets you can buy right now.

items.name: Meta Quest 3S (128GB)
items.description: The best entry-level VR headset. Great mixed reality, solid game library, no PC required.

items.name: Meta Quest 3 (512GB)
items.description: The full-featured Quest. Better lenses, more storage, best standalone VR experience available.

items.name: PlayStation VR2
items.description: Best console VR. Eye tracking, haptic feedback, and incredible PS5 exclusives like Horizon Call of the Mountain.

items.name: Bigscreen Beyond 2
items.description: 107 grams. The lightest, sharpest PC VR headset ever made. Enthusiast-grade and custom-fit.

items.name: Apple Vision Pro (M5)
items.description: The most advanced spatial computer. Incredible display, eye and hand tracking, visionOS ecosystem.

sections.title: AR / XR Glasses
sections.description: Smart glasses and wearable displays for mixed reality, media, and on-the-go computing.

items.name: Ray-Ban Meta (Gen 2)
items.description: The runaway hit of 2026 smart glasses. Meta AI, open-ear audio, 12MP camera, and genuine all-day wearability.

items.name: VITURE Beast
items.description: XR display glasses with a 174-inch virtual screen. Works with PS5, Switch, Steam Deck, and phones.

items.name: RayNeo Air 3s
items.description: Lightweight 1080p Micro-OLED display glasses. A budget-friendly gateway into wearable big-screen video.

sections.title: Accessories
sections.description: Essential upgrades, comfort add-ons, cables, and charging gear for your Quest 3.

items.name: Meta Quest 3 Elite Strap
items.description: Official comfort upgrade. Better weight distribution and dial-fit adjustment for long sessions.

items.name: ZyberVR Battery Head Strap
items.description: Extended battery life and improved comfort in one. The best third-party Quest strap.

items.name: KIWI Design Head Strap
items.description: Budget-friendly comfort strap. Solid build quality for the price.

items.name: KIWI V3 Facial Interface
items.description: Breathable replacement cushion for Quest 3. Blocks light leaks and keeps sweat off the lenses during long sessions.

items.name: ZyberVR Face Cover
items.description: Washable skin-friendly face cover with magnetic attachment. A sanity-saving upgrade if you share your Quest with family.

items.name: KIWI G4 Pro Controller Grips
items.description: Non-slip silicone grip covers for Quest 3 controllers. Essential for sweaty sessions of Beat Saber, Supernatural, or Gorilla Tag.

items.name: KIWI Design Carrying Case for Quest 3
items.description: Hard shell travel case built for Quest 3. Fits the headset, controllers, and a charging cable with room for one accessory strap.

items.name: KIWI Design Link Cable (5m)
items.description: USB 3.0 to USB-C cable for Quest PC VR. Works identically to Meta's official cable at a fraction of the price, with passthrough charging built in.

items.name: ZyberVR Charging Dock for Quest 3
items.description: Magnetic dock that charges the headset and both controllers at once. The nicest quality-of-life upgrade you can make for $60.

sections.title: Gaming Hardware
sections.description: VR-ready GPU recommendations for PC VR gaming.

items.name: NVIDIA RTX 5090
items.description: The absolute top of the stack. 32GB of GDDR7, DLSS 4, and the only card that drives the Bigscreen Beyond 2 at full resolution without compromise.

items.name: NVIDIA RTX 5070 Ti
items.description: Blackwell's sweet spot. Roughly 4080 Super performance with DLSS 4, and the best price-per-frame in PC VR right now.

items.name: NVIDIA RTX 4080 Super
items.description: Still a fantastic PC VR card if you can find one in stock. Handles the Beyond 2 at near-native resolution on most titles.

items.name: NVIDIA RTX 4070 Super
items.description: The best budget GPU for PC VR. Handles Quest Link and SteamVR at high settings with plenty of headroom.
